mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_push.push_preference SET global_enabled = #{globalEnabled}, interaction_enabled = #{interactionEnabled}, follow_enabled = #{followEnabled}, system_enabled = #{systemEnabled}, order_enabled = #{orderEnabled}, im_enabled = #{imEnabled}, show_im_detail = #{showImDetail}, quiet_hours_enabled = #{quietHoursEnabled}, quiet_start = #{quietStart}, quiet_end = #{quietEnd}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, global_enabled, interaction_enabled, follow_enabled, system_enabled, order_enabled, im_enabled, show_im_detail, quiet_hours_enabled, quiet_start, quiet_end, created_at, updated_at FROM bluenote_push.push_preference WHERE user_id = #{userId}
